title: Heaven Dimension
description: Fly up with elytra to see a brand new world known as Heaven! A peaceful dimension with rich villagers!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qkvWzCO6Aj0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

***How to teleport**:*

Go at **Y = 360 (or Y = 300 for older versions)**

*with Elytra and Fireworks.*

Fly up diagonally so you don't fall when you teleport!

I*f you fall from the dimension, you teleport back to the overworld*

---

**Command:**

```
/execute in heaven:sky run tp ~ ~ ~
```

***Dimension Info:***

**Meta of the game:**

After
 getting the elytra from The End, you are given the opportunity to 
explore a peaceful dimension where it's always day without hostile mobs 
to ruin your base or kill you. It's a very **end-game dimension** rewarding you for finding the elytra *(since its almost the only way to go to Y = 300),* and making it home safely. Explore the deep forests and the glorious villages.

Have fun playing my datapack :D

**Heaven Dimension**

- Advancements
- Villages with OP loot
- Arrows that ignore the law of gravity
- Always day
- No hostile mobs
- Animals spawn such as: Bees, pandas, parrots, pigs, etc..
- Vibrant grass/leaves
- Amazing generation
- Unique trees
- Flowers everywhere!

***Credits:***

Massive help from Tando (TandoYT) in building most village houses and being amazing

**Remember to backup your world before installing!**
